title: Memoranda to Registrants, Applicants and their Representatives - Canada.ca
content:
## Memoranda to Registrants, Applicants and their Representatives
- The Pest Management Regulatory Agency is now accepting pesticide registration data from Palamur Laboratories [2025-02-27]
- Memo to registrants on the notice of intent to discontinue the sale of a pest control product under the Pest Control Products Act [2025-02-26]
- Verifying chemistry of registered technical grade active ingredients and integrated system products [2024-06-24]
- Pest Management Regulatory Agency not accepting pesticide registration data from non-compliant laboratory [2024-06-13]
- Use of Pilot-Scale Data to Register Multiple Sites for New Active Ingredients [2017-09-12]
- Changes to Label Requirements [2017-07-17]
- Memo to Applicants and Registrants: New Version of the e-Index Builder [2015-06-17]
- Data Protection Submission Review Process [2014-12-18]
- Change in Storage Stability Data Requirement for End-Use Products and Manufacturing Concentrates [2014-06-13]
- Label Review [2014-05-02]
- Requirement for the submission of a statement of product specifications form (SPSF) [2014-05-02]
- OMRI Label Claims on Pest Control Products [2010-02-03]
- Capsaicin Statement of Guarantee and Labelling Allowances [2010-08-31]
- Category C Application Guidance Document [2023-09-18]
- Considerations for Pesticidal Uses of Antimicrobial Drugs [2009-09-11]
- Final decision to apply the Significant New Activity provisions of the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 to six substances with exclusive pesticidal uses [2009-08-11]
- Strategy for the Implementation of SPN 2008-01, The Application of Uncertainty Factors and the PCPA Factor in the Human Health Risk Assessment of Pesticides [2008-07-29]
- Requirements and Expectations for Letters of Confirmation of Source of Supply [2008-07-04]
- Notice of intent to apply the Significant New Activity provisions of CEPA to six substances with exclusive pesticidal uses [2007-08-13]
- Post-categorization of substances on the Domestic Substances List: Impacts of the Challenge for Pesticide Registrants [2007-05-28] Attachment 1: Actives, Formulants and Formulant Impurities included on the Challenge List, resulting from Categorization of the DSL [2007-05-16]
- Attachment 1: Actives, Formulants and Formulant Impurities included on the Challenge List, resulting from Categorization of the DSL [2007-05-16]
- DEET (N,N-diethyl-m-toluamide) Statement of Guarantee and Labelling Allowances [2005-07-27]
